title: Rainbow Ancient Debris
description: Makes Ancient Debris rainbow with smooth gradient and glow
body:
A colorful resource pack that turns Ancient Debris into a smooth rainbow gradient with subtle glow.

✨ Features:
- Smooth rainbow gradient (top to bottom)
- 3D-wrapped color effect
- Subtle glowing cracks
- Easy to spot in the Nether

🎮 Works with Minecraft 1.21.8+
